name: Chicken Breasts Florentine
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons Enviroment Golden Onion Soup Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a shallow dish, dredge chicken breasts in flour, shaking off excess.
3. In another shallow dish, beat eggs.
4. In a third shallow dish, mix bread crumbs, garlic, onion soup mix, and parsley.
5. Dip chicken in beaten eggs, then coat with breadcrumb mixture.
6. Heat oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium heat.
7. Brown chicken breasts in oil until golden brown on both sides.
8. Remove from pan and drain on paper towels.
9. In the same pan, sauté onion soup mix for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
10. Add white wine, water, and pepper; bring to a simmer.
11. Return chicken to the pan and lower into the sauce.
12. Cover and bake in preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for 20-25 minutes or until cooked through.
13. Garnish with parsley before serving.
Side dishes such as hot cooked rice pilaf, white rice, or hot cooked spinach can be served alongside this dish.
